sql_array: CREATE TABLE distances (id UInt32, vector1 Array(Int32), vector2 Array(Int32), distance Float64);
INSERT INTO distances (id, vector1, vector2, distance) VALUES (1, [1, 2], [2, 3], L2Distance([1, 2], [2, 3]));
UPDATE distances SET distance = L2Distance(vector1, vector2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, L2Distance(vector1, vector2) AS calculated_distance FROM distances;
SELECT id FROM distances WHERE L2Distance(vector1, vector2) < 2.5;
